item.title: There should ultimately be room for all of us 🖤 I appreciate all the people who ...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (15 medier)

@andersdalhoej

There should ultimately be room for all of us 🖤

I appreciate all the people who joined pride 2025 for their own reasons - and everyone who joined in on the conversation on where k🖤nk belongs compared to pride 🖤 There is a lot of political things to talk about as well, but for this little series it’s about the Manifest CPH community

Se slideshow på Instagram

item.title: As a celebration of @frida.retz pregnancy and her art, we decided to spend and c...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (6 medier)

@andersdalhoej

As a celebration of @frida.retz pregnancy and her art, we decided to spend and creative evening capturing eachothers style and expression in a unity - ended up as this series 🤍 Thank you for letting me capture this episode of your life - and congrats with your baby 👏🏻

Se slideshow på Instagram
